ops.title: Recon lane defaults to gpt-5.6-luna at xhigh; sonnet-5 is the carve-out

ops.body:
# Recon lane → gpt-5.6-luna at xhigh (v6, 2026-07-14)

Supersedes the v4.1 bounded-only guidance. A 20-brief blind-judged head-to-head across 6 repos (note `21236a15`) showed **gpt-5.6-luna at xhigh matching or beating sonnet-5 on recall** — 100% on exhaustive enumerations, tied on deep traces, and winning routine-chore quality (diff-summary rubric 5.0 vs sonnet 2.0) — with **zero false cites**, at ~3x speed and ~80% lower cost. Zero confident undercounts this round (vs v4.1's one). The recon lane now DEFAULTS to luna; sonnet is the named carve-out.

## Default: route recon to luna (via codex, `-m luna`, xhigh)

Enumerations, config/wiring locates, subsystem traces, pattern sweeps, and routine chores (diff and log triage, classify, extract, structured digest, doc lookup).

**Two mandatory constraints:**
1. `model_reasoning_effort=xhigh` — luna at `high` drops whole subsystems on deep traces (measured fk-trace 22/35 vs 31/35 at xhigh).
2. **Exhaustive enumerations carry a cross-model verify pass** — luna's historical failure mode is a confident wrong count. A luna/sonnet/sol verifier caught 100% of planted undercounts (12/12, R5), so the mitigation is a second-model verify over the enumeration output, not self-verify.

## Carve-out: stay on sonnet-5 (Explore) when

- The surface is Claude-only — the `Explore` hook, or anywhere codex isn't reachable.
- Coverage must sweep >300K tokens in one pass — luna's retrieval cliff (MRCR 41.3% at 256K+); xhigh does not move it (effort is reasoning depth, not retrieval span).
- A silent miss is unrecoverable and no verify pass will run.

## Surfaces that encode this (keep in sync)

- `plugin/guides/md/claude-rules.md` sonnet-5 + gpt-5.6-sol rows (canonical; CLAUDE.md renders from it)
- `plugins/codex/skills/codex/SKILL.md` § Model Variants and Escalation
- `plugins/codex/agents/codex-wrapper.md` (orchestrator-marked luna swap)
- `plugins/repo-bootstrap/tests/test_scaffold.py` pins "recon lane" in all three surfaces
- `plugins/repo-bootstrap/skills/repo-bootstrap/reference/base-conventions.md` paraphrase

Shipped in cc-skills 3ec0c684 → 704f3ab8 (render) → 0b3bba9b (codex 0.16.0, repo-bootstrap 0.54.1). The Explore→sonnet rewrite hook stays (guards the haiku default on the Claude-only surface).

ops.when: When deciding model routing for reconnaissance or routine subagent work — enumerations, config/wiring locates, subsystem traces, pattern sweeps, and routine chores (diff/log triage, classify, extract, digest, doc lookup)
